name: uiable-date-picker-disabled
title: Disabled Date Picker
description: Date Picker Disabled variant for date-picker.

files.content: "use client" import { useState } from "react" // assets import { CalendarIcon } from "lucide-react" // shadcn import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Calendar } from "@/components/ui/calendar" import { Field, FieldLabel } from "@/components/ui/field" import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger, } from "@/components/ui/popover" // ------------------------------ | DATE PICKER - DISABLED | ------------------------------ // export function DatePickerDisabled() { const [date] = useState(undefined) return ( Date (Disabled) } > Pick a date ) }
